headline: ARCB Gains From AI, Pricing Discipline and a Tighter Truckload Cycle
summary: ARCB gains from tighter truckload capacity, disciplined pricing and AI-led savings, but inflation and mix pressures keep execution in focus.

raw.headline: ARCB Gains From AI, Pricing Discipline and a Tighter Truckload Cycle
raw.summary: ARCB gains from tighter truckload capacity, disciplined pricing and AI-led savings, but inflation and mix pressures keep execution in focus.

headline: ArcBest's Outlook Hinges on Pricing, Productivity and Mix
summary: ARCB's outlook rests on firmer pricing, AI-led productivity savings and Asset-Light stabilization as freight risks still need close watching.

raw.headline: ArcBest's Outlook Hinges on Pricing, Productivity and Mix
raw.summary: ARCB's outlook rests on firmer pricing, AI-led productivity savings and Asset-Light stabilization as freight risks still need close watching.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Raises Price Target to $224
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Jonathan Chappell   maintains C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $222 to $224.
